title: Sensible MC
description: A hand-selected modpack that aim to improve various elements of vanilla Minecraft without totally changing the basic gameplay.
body:
# ![Sensible MC](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/709483555121659904/1346666779765768192/Banner_1.png?ex=67c904ac&is=67c7b32c&hm=8f748217839cd98699135706b021dc0dcc5f2648db9f5cb89642dc7a6ba8eeeb&)
## **Sensible MC - A Smarter Vanilla+ Experience**
- Sensible MC is an expertly curated modpack that enhances Minecraft's performance, visuals, and features while preserving the vanilla feel. Every included mod has been hand-selected to ensure a smooth, immersive, and sensible upgrade to the base game.
---
## **Features**
- Optimized Performance – Faster loading, better FPS, and improved responsiveness.  
- Visual Enhancements – Subtle graphical improvements without straying from vanilla aesthetics.  
- Expanded Gameplay – Smart quality-of-life additions that feel like natural extensions of Minecraft.  
- Built-in Shader & Resource Pack Support – Customize your experience with pre-included options.  
- Lightweight & Compatible – Works well on most systems and supports multiplayer.
---
![A supplementary image for the "performance" heading of the description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1364f846901b8ee31514e56921f48355a4513580_0.webp)

## **Performance**

- The modpack is relatively optimized for most systems, but performance cannot be fully guaranteed in all cases. With a large number of mods and assets to load, results vary by hardware. Allocate at least 7-8 GB of RAM to the Modrinth profile to ensure stable operation.
---
![A supplementary image for the "MODS" heading of the description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96584cfee86bb591be6dede986d448ffd4a6fe4_0.webp)

## **Mods**

- The modpack contains a substantial number of mods that integrate effectively with one another. Most provide quality-of-life enhancements. Others introduce new items, locations, mobs, and mechanics that align with the base game while expanding available activities.
---
![A supplementary image for the "RP" heading of the description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ea5bc8caa35359b977ad005e5767b7837af756f_0.webp)

## **Resource Packs**

- The included resource and texture packs enhance multiple elements throughout the game. Items, GUI, mobs, and the player model receive improvements that maintain the vanilla aesthetic.
---
![A supplementary image for the "SHADERS" heading of the description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb418ff29265596713a02154ccb406d05907e99_0.webp)

## **Shaders**

- The modpack includes a variety of shaders selected for visual appeal and performance balance. These options deliver improved appearance without excessive impact on frame rates. The preferred shaderpack in the selection is Photon.
---
## **Community**
- Questions, suggestions, or assistance requests may be directed to the Discord server: https://discord.gg/dRqR4x5RtX  

The core experience remains complete and balanced, with periodic updates to mods and assets.
